faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Build a Blue Lock Squad

questions.question: What is Build a Blue Lock Squad?
questions.answer: Build a Blue Lock Squad is a Roblox football team building game where you collect powerful Blue Lock characters, form competitive squads, and challenge opponents with strategic formations and player abilities.

questions.question: Where can I redeem Build a Blue Lock Squad codes?
questions.answer: You can redeem Build a Blue Lock Squad codes inside the game by opening the menu, finding the code redemption option, entering a valid code, and claiming your free spins, coins, and rewards.

questions.question: Which players are the best in Build a Blue Lock Squad?
questions.answer: Top-tier Build a Blue Lock Squad players include high-impact forwards like Isagi Yoichi and Rin Itoshi. Check the Players Tier List for the full S and A tier rankings.

questions.question: How do I build a strong squad in Build a Blue Lock Squad?
questions.answer: Focus resources on a few strong players, balance your squad with different play styles, and upgrade efficiently. The Beginner Guide and Tips and Tricks sections cover proven team building strategies.

questions.question: Is Build a Blue Lock Squad free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Build a Blue Lock Squad is free to play on Roblox, with optional in-game purchases and free codes for extra resources.

questions.question: What controls do I need for Build a Blue Lock Squad?
questions.answer: Build a Blue Lock Squad uses standard keyboard and mouse controls: WASD to move, Space to jump, Shift to sprint, and the mouse to control the camera. See the Controls Guide for the full reference.
